Title: Love & Death
Actors: Elizabeth Olsen, Jesse Plemons, Lily Rabe
Plot: Candy Montgomery and Betty Gore had a lot in common: They sang together in the Methodist church choir, their daughters were best friends, and their husbands had good jobs working for technology companies in the north Dallas suburbs known as Silicon Prairie. But beneath the placid surface of their seemingly perfect lives, both women simmered with unspoken frustrations and unanswered desires.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 1 win & 13 nominations total
